code:
fn safe_divide(_ a: Int, _ b: Int) -> Option<Int>
  if b == 0
    None
  else
    Some(a / b)
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match safe_divide(10, 2)
  when Some(v)
    println("OK=#{v}")
  when None
    println("NONE")
  end
  match safe_divide(10, 0)
  when Some(v)
    println("OK=#{v}")
  when None
    println("NONE")
  end
end
